x:
Ship the code. PitchFlow ships the story.

Give it a public GitHub repository. It pins one commit, gathers bounded evidence, and uses GPT-5.6 Sol through local Codex to direct the site, social assets, copy, carousel, and video.

Explore the source: https://github.com/sickn33/pitchflow
linkedIn:
Launching PitchFlow: a local-first, repo-native AI launch studio for developers who want the campaign to be as rigorous as the code.

PitchFlow starts from a canonical public GitHub repository, resolves a pinned commit, and gathers bounded evidence without cloning or executing the target project. GPT-5.6 Sol then works through the developer's authenticated local Codex workflow to direct one structured campaign.

That campaign can drive a static microsite, exact-size social graphics, a five-slide carousel, X and LinkedIn copy, Product Hunt copy, email, landscape and portrait videos, checksums, and a safe ZIP export.

The result is a launch narrative connected to repository evidence from intake through export.

Explore the source repository: https://github.com/sickn33/pitchflow

productHunt.name: PitchFlow
productHunt.tagline: Evidence-grounded campaigns from your GitHub repository
productHunt.description: PitchFlow is a local-first, repo-native AI launch studio. Give it a canonical public GitHub repository URL and it resolves a pinned commit, gathers bounded evidence without cloning or executing the project, and uses GPT-5.6 Sol through your authenticated local Codex workflow to direct a complete campaign. One validated manifest drives a static microsite, social graphics, a five-slide carousel, channel copy, landscape and portrait videos, a checksummed asset index, and a traversal-safe ZIP.
productHunt.firstComment: Hi Product Hunt — PitchFlow began with a simple premise: a developer tool's launch story should be grounded in the product's actual repository. The local workflow pins a commit, lets you inspect bounded evidence, and then asks GPT-5.6 Sol through Codex to direct the campaign as one structured system. Fresh analysis and generation remain on your machine, while the public viewer is an immutable, read-only dogfood package. The project is MIT licensed, and the source is available at https://github.com/sickn33/pitchflow.

email.subject: Meet PitchFlow: launch campaigns grounded in your repository
email.body:
You shipped the code. PitchFlow helps ship the story.

Start with a canonical public GitHub repository. PitchFlow pins one commit, collects bounded evidence without cloning or executing the project, and uses GPT-5.6 Sol through your authenticated local Codex workflow to direct an evidence-linked campaign.

One validated manifest can drive the microsite, social graphics, five-slide carousel, channel copy, landscape and portrait videos, checksums, and ZIP export.

Explore the source repository:
https://github.com/sickn33/pitchflow
